title: swift.xrt.spectrum
description: GCN Notice schema for Swift XRT spectrum notices (packet types 68 and 77: SWIFT_XRT_SPEC and SWIFT_XRT_SPEC_PROC). The XRT spectrum notice is issued when the XRT has accumulated sufficient data to generate a spectrum FITS file for the trigger. Type=68 is the raw flight notice; type=77 is the ground-processed notice. Both types share an identical packet word layout. bin[7-8] contain the XRT boresight RA/Dec (ra_pointing/dec_pointing); bin[5-6] the spectrum start time (observation_start); bin[9] the livetime (observation_livetime); bin[10-11] the spectrum stop time (observation_stop); bin[21] the termination condition code.

ccd_readout_mode.description: XRT CCD readout mode active during the spectrum integration. Decoded from the mode field (bin[12]).

ccd_waveform_id.description: XRT CCD waveform identifier number (typically 50 or 60). Derived from the waveform field (bin[13]). Specifies the CCD clocking waveform used during the observation.

amplifier_gain.description: XRT CCD amplifier gain setting as a multiplicative factor. Not directly available as a standalone field in the spectrum packet — derived from the gain sub-field packed in bin[12] (mode) or bin[13] (waveform) depending on implementation.

bias.description: XRT CCD bias level in ADU (Analogue-to-Digital Units). Derived from the bias field (bin[14]). Used in CCD calibration to establish the baseline signal level. Only meaningful in Low Rate Photodiode mode.

enum: Spectrum generated at the LRPD-to-WT transition
Spectrum generated at the WT-to-LRorPC transition
termination_condition.description: Condition that caused the XRT spectrum accumulation to terminate. Decoded from the term_code field (bin[21]).

subtype.description: Indicates whether this notice was generated from raw flight telemetry ('FLIGHT', type=68) or from ground reprocessing ('GROUND', type=77). Derived from misc bit 2^30: 0 = FLIGHT, 1 = GROUND.

watchdog_timeout.description: Indicates whether this XRT spectrum notice was forced out early via the watchdog timeout mechanism rather than completing normally. Derived from misc bit 2^29.

fits_file_does_not_exist.description: Indicates whether the processed XRT spectrum had a processing error, and thus does not exist

first_packet_missing.description: Indicates whether the assembled raw XRT spectrum had an error related to the first telemetry packet

second_packet_missing.description: Indicates whether the assembled raw XRT spectrum had an error related to the second telemetry packet

third_packet_missing.description: Indicates whether the assembled raw XRT spectrum had an error related to the third telemetry packet

spectrum_fits_file.description: Dictionary holding the FITS filename and its base64-encoded file content.

additionalProperties.description: Base64-encoded content of the XRT spectrum FITS file. The raw binary packet (bin[22–38]) contains only the filename portion of the URL pointing to this file; the base64-encoded file content is populated during GCN ground processing.
